source_pr.title: planner: support window function frame clause
source_pr.body:
<!--
Thank you for contributing to TiDB! Please read TiDB's [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md) document **BEFORE** filing this PR.
-->

### What problem does this PR solve? <!--add issue link with summary if exists-->

Support frame clause in planner. Ref: https://dev.mysql.com/doc/refman/8.0/en/window-functions-frames.html

### What is changed and how it works?

When building the window functions, we resolve the frame clause and check if it is valid, if so, we will store it in the window function plan.

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

 - Unit test

Code changes

 - Has exported function/method change

Side effects

 - None

Related changes

 - None

symptoms: result: "[planner:3587]Window '<unnamed window>' with RANGE N PRECEDING/FOLLOWING frame requires exactly one ORDER BY expression, of numeric or temporal type", (planner/core/logical_plan_test.go)
failure_signature: result: "[planner:3587]Window '<unnamed window>' with RANGE N PRECEDING/FOLLOWING frame requires exactly one ORDER BY expression, of numeric or temporal type", (planner/core/logical_plan_test.go)
fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: evidence: result: "[planner:3587]Window '<unnamed window>' with RANGE N PRECEDING/FOLLOWING frame requires exactly one ORDER BY expression, of numeric or temporal type", (planner/core/logical_plan_test.go)

files: go.mod, go.sum, planner/core/errors.go, planner/core/expression_rewriter.go, planner/core/logical_plan_builder.go, planner/core/logical_plan_test.go, planner/core/logical_plans.go, planner/core/mock.go
